## Reference documentation
- Snowflake documentation DCM Projects : https://docs.snowflake.com/en/user-guide/dcm-projects/dcm-projects-overview
- Example of DCM Projects : https://github.com/Snowflake-Labs/snowflake-dcm-projects

## Project context

The goal of this poc is to understand how DCM Projects on Snowflake works by creating a use case from scratch.
